summary: The evaluation corpus is now structured into six buckets with full-target counts of 32/32/32/32/36/36 for a total target size of 200 prompts.
A flat JSONL schema now captures gold Gate 3 verdicts plus reason categories, and gold skill-advisor expectations including explicit abstention cases via skill_top_1=none and skill_correct=no.
Iteration 2 seeded 60 prompts, evenly distributed across six buckets, with deliberate coverage of false-positive tokens, continuity prompts, deep-loop prompts, and connector/skill routing prompts.
Expand the corpus toward 200 rows and run Gate 3 on the first 50 prompts to sanity-check the gold labels before full scoring.
